privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how enpii studio ('we', 'us', or 'our') collects, uses, and protects information when you use EnStorage ('the Service'). By using the Service you agree to the practices described below.
privacy.dataWeCollectBody:
Account information: When you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture from Google. We use this to identify your account and personalize the interface.

Files and metadata: We store the files you upload and the metadata needed to organize them (folder names, star flags, share settings). File contents are stored exactly as uploaded.

Usage data: We log basic request metadata (timestamp, endpoint, status code) for security and abuse prevention. We do not use third-party analytics or tracking pixels.

API keys: When you create a personal access token, only a salted hash is stored. The plaintext token is shown to you once and cannot be recovered later.

Google account links: If you connect a Google account for cross-cloud features, we store an encrypted refresh token. We never see your Google password.
privacy.howWeUseBody: We use the information we collect solely to operate the Service: to authenticate you, store and retrieve your files, deliver files you share via share links, and notify you of activity on your account. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.sharingBody: Folders you choose to share become accessible to anyone who has the share link. Share links include a random token and may be revoked at any time from your Folders page. You are responsible for the content you make available through share links.
privacy.thirdPartyBody:
We rely on the following third parties to operate the Service:

Google (OAuth & Google Drive integration): governed by Google's Privacy Policy. We only request the scopes needed to sign you in and, optionally, to access files you choose to import.

Hosting and storage providers: data may transit through or be stored on infrastructure providers that we use to run the Service.

Email providers: if we send transactional email (for example password resets), it is routed through a standard SMTP provider.
privacy.securityBody: We use industry-standard measures to protect your data, including HTTPS for all transport, hashed passwords, and hashed API keys. No system is perfectly secure; if you discover a vulnerability, please contact us at the address below.
privacy.retentionBody: Your files remain in your account until you delete them. Deleting a file or folder moves it to a soft-delete state and it is permanently removed after 30 days, unless you restore it. If you delete your account, all associated data is permanently deleted within 30 days.
privacy.yourRightsBody: You may access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time through the Profile page, or by contacting us. If you are located in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, or California, you have additional rights under applicable law (GDPR / CCPA), including the right to data portability and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be announced through the Service. Continued use of the Service after a change indicates acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact us at enpiiofficial@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ('Terms') govern your use of EnStorage operated by enpii studio ('we', 'us', or 'our'). By creating an account or using the Service, you agree to these Terms.
terms.eligibilityBody: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum age of digital consent in your jurisdiction) to use the Service. By using the Service you represent that you meet this requirement.
terms.accountBody: You are responsible for activity on your account and for keeping your credentials secure. You agree to provide accurate information and to notify us promptly of any unauthorized use. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.acceptableUseBody:
You agree not to use the Service to:

- Store or distribute content that is illegal in your jurisdiction, infringes intellectual property rights, or is intended to harm others.
- Upload malware, ransomware, or other malicious code.
- Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts, the Service, or its infrastructure.
- Use the Service in a way that imposes a disproportionate load or interferes with other users.
- Resell or sublicense access to the Service without our written permission.
terms.yourContentBody: You retain all rights to the files you upload. You grant us a limited license to host, store, transmit, and process your content solely to operate the Service for you. This license ends when you delete the content, except where retention is required by law.
terms.serviceBody: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features of the Service at any time, with reasonable notice for material changes. We provide the Service 'as is' and do not guarantee that it will be uninterrupted or error-free.
terms.terminationBody: You may stop using the Service at any time and delete your account from the Profile page. We may suspend or terminate your access if you breach these Terms, with or without prior notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ends, but the sections of these Terms that by their nature should survive will survive.
terms.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, our aggregate liability for any claim arising from or related to the Service is limited to the amount you paid us (if any) in the 12 months before the claim, or USD 10, whichever is greater. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
terms.changesBody: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be announced through the Service. Continued use after a change indicates acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.governingLawBody: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any dispute arising from or related to the Service will be resolved in the courts of Indonesia, unless mandatory consumer protection laws in your jurisdiction give you the right to bring proceedings locally.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at enpiiofficial@gmail.com.
